Author.title: Author
Author.description: Profile information for a news writer/editor.

id.description: The unique user ID matching their Firebase Authentication UID.

bio.description: A short biography of the author.

avatar.description: URL to the author's avatar image.

role.description: The authorization role, e.g. editor, contributor, or admin.

createdAt.description: When the author profile was created.

Article.title: Article
Article.description: A news article, opinion piece, or editorial published on the platform.

id.description: The unique document ID for the article.

summary.description: A short excerpt or summary of the article.

content.description: The full rich-text content of the article.

featuredImage.description: URL to the main featured image.

images.description: List of URLs for other images used in the article.

category.description: The primary category (e.g. Ghana, Africa, World, Sports, Football, Business, Technology, Entertainment, Health, Lifestyle).

tags.description: List of tags associated with the article.

authorId.description: UID of the author who wrote the article.

createdAt.description: When the article document was initially created.

updatedAt.description: When the article was last updated.

publishedAt.description: The scheduled or actual publication timestamp.

isSponsored.description: Whether this is sponsored brand content.

isAffiliate.description: Whether this is an affiliate/monetized article.

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: A reader's response to an article.

authorId.description: The commenter's UID if logged in, or 'guest'.

authorName.description: The display name of the commenter.

authorAvatar.description: Avatar image URL of the commenter.

content.description: The text content of the comment.

approved.description: Whether the comment has been moderated and approved for display.

NewsletterSubscription.title: NewsletterSubscription
NewsletterSubscription.description: An email subscription for news updates.

AdPlacement.title: AdPlacement
AdPlacement.description: An advertisement slot or direct sponsorship banner.

imageUrl.description: URL to the ad creative banner.

active.description: Whether the ad is currently active and should serve.

impressions.description: Number of times the ad was displayed.

clicks.description: Number of times the ad was clicked.

/authors/{authorId}.description: User profiles and author portfolios for the writing staff.

/articles/{articleId}.description: News and commentary database containing all stories.

/articles/{articleId}/comments/{commentI.description: Moderated discussions attached to a specific news article.

/newsletter/{emailHash}.description: Mailing list for periodic bulletins and breaking news alerts.

/ads/{adId}.description: Ad slots and custom-served banner promotions.
